title: Ghost Preview + Placement Sounds

tasks.title: Ghost preview in target cell during drag
tasks.description: When dragging any piece (track, scenery, train) over the grid, show a translucent 50% opacity preview of the piece at the target cell. The preview renders inside the actual cell (separate from the cursor ghost). Clean up preview when leaving cell or ending drag.
changes: Add CSS classes: .ghost-preview (opacity 0.5, pointer-events none), .cell.ghost-match (green inset border), .cell.ghost-mismatch (red inset border)
New function showCellGhostPreview(row, col) — renders translucent SVG/emoji in the cell based on dragInfo
New function clearCellGhostPreview() — removes ghost preview elements and border classes
Modify highlightCellUnder() to call showCellGhostPreview when dragInfo exists
acceptance_criteria: Ghost preview visible in target cell during drag at ~50% opacity
Preview appears/disappears as cursor moves between cells
Works for all track types, scenery types, and train

tasks.title: Ghost shows auto-connected rotation
tasks.description: When dragging a track piece from the palette, the ghost preview shows the auto-connected rotation (from findBestRotation). When dragging from the grid, it shows the piece's existing rotation.
changes: In showCellGhostPreview: if dragInfo.source === 'palette' and type is a track, call findBestRotation to determine preview rotation
If dragInfo.source === 'grid', use dragInfo.rotation for preview
acceptance_criteria: Palette drag: ghost preview rotates to best-fit rotation at each cell
Grid drag: ghost preview keeps original rotation
Rotation matches what would actually be placed

tasks.title: Green/red border on ghost preview
tasks.description: When the ghost preview shows a track piece, add a colored inset border: green if at least one connection will match neighbors, red if track neighbors exist but no connections match. No colored border for scenery or if no track neighbors.
changes: In showCellGhostPreview: compute connection score for track pieces
Add .ghost-match class (green inset glow) if score > 0
Add .ghost-mismatch class (red inset glow) if score === 0 but track neighbors exist
acceptance_criteria: Green border when ghost preview will connect to at least one neighbor
Red border when ghost preview won't connect to any adjacent track
No colored border for scenery, train, or cells with no track neighbors

tasks.title: Differentiated placement sounds
tasks.description: Replace the uniform SFX.place() with context-specific sounds. Wooden 'thunk' for track placement, softer 'click' for scenery, distinct pitch for rotation.
changes: Modify SFX.place() to produce a deeper wooden thunk sound (lower freq, noise component)
Add SFX.placeScenery() — softer, lighter click sound
Adjust SFX.rotate() to have a more distinct pitch (slightly lower, click-like)
Modify placePiece() to choose SFX.place() vs SFX.placeScenery() based on type
acceptance_criteria: Track placement produces a satisfying wooden thunk
Scenery placement produces a softer click sound
Rotation has a distinctly different pitch from placement
All sounds still respect mute toggle

testing_focus: Drag from palette over grid: ghost preview appears with correct rotation
Drag from grid over empty cells: ghost preview at original rotation
Green/red borders update correctly as cursor moves between cells
Ghost preview cleans up on drop and on drag cancel
Sound differentiation between track/scenery placement and rotation
No performance degradation from ghost preview rendering
All existing features still work (regression check)
